sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import { makeStyles } from '@material-ui/core/styles';
import { Container, Grid, Paper, Typography } from '@material-ui/core';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

const useStyles = makeStyles((theme) => ({
  root: {
    padding: theme.spacing(3),
  },
  paper: {
    padding: theme.spacing(2),
    textAlign: 'center',
    color: theme.palette.text.secondary,
    height: '100%',
  },
  link: {
    textDecoration: 'none',
    color: theme.palette.text.primary,
  },
}));

export default function Dashboard() {
  const classes = useStyles();

  return (
    <Container className={classes.root}>
      <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>Inventory Dashboard</Typography>
      <Grid container spacing={3}>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/items" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">Item Management</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/categories" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">Category Management</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/purchases" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">Purchase Management</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/sales" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">Sale Management</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/bills" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">Bill Management</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/companies" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">Company Management</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/expenses" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">Expense Management</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/focs" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">FOC Management</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={3}>
          <Link to="/reports" className={classes.link}>
            <Paper className={classes.paper}>
              <Typography variant="h6">Reports</Typography>
            </Paper>
          </Link>
        </Grid>
      </Grid>
    </Container>
  );
}
